title: Steampunk mages be cooking
description:
A modpack designed to be just a bit more then vanilla+ to extend the longevity of the sessions.

designed with performance in mind, while also having pre installed shader packs to ensure higher end pc's get tortured alike.
body:
# Steampunk Mages be Cooking

SMbC is a modpack designed around exploration, magic, cooking and a lot of create.
It features plenty of gorgeous world generation mods and plenty (and i mean plenty) of beautifull new structures.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93538d5c977ac9ed7f9e300c813245260c819f1d.png)
---
## Optimization first
The modpack is packed full with some of the best optimization mods that current minecraft has to offer to ensure a good fps no matter the pc. Also highly customizable via Distant Horizons settings and a plethora of of shaderpacks to tweak around with until its just perfect to your liking.

---
## Gameplay
Pick and choose between many different weapons, spells and armor sets from a wide arrangement of mods. You'll most likely need to use them to work your way through the new dangerous biomes and enemies littered across the world and (new) dimensions.

---
Linkbacks: 

[Sea dwellers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers)

---

If you have any questions or new ideas please let me know through discord!
